cta_targets.PI: Principal Investigators — researchers with prototypes seeking commercialization pathways
cta_targets.TTO: Technology Transfer Offices — institutional bodies managing IP licensing and valorisation
cta_targets.Engineering: Engineers and postdocs — technical audience seeking implementation guidance
cta_targets.Ecosystem: Regional development boards, policymakers, and ecosystem builders

funnel_stages.label: High-Intent / Bottom of Funnel
funnel_stages.intent: A TTO or PI has a working prototype, realizes the VC route won't work, and is actively looking for an execution partner.
funnel_stages.strategy: Map these to core service pages.

funnel_stages.label: Middle of Funnel / Educational
funnel_stages.description: The 'How do I scale this' searches
funnel_stages.intent: An engineer or postdoc is trying to figure out how to scale their bench prototype and is running into the 'Platform Tax.'
funnel_stages.strategy: Map these to deep-dive engineering articles and technical case studies.

funnel_stages.label: Top of Funnel / Ecosystem
funnel_stages.intent: Ecosystem builders, grant writers, and TTOs looking for structural models and funding strategies.
funnel_stages.strategy: Map these to thought-leadership articles and whitepapers.
